title: obione limbata
intro: Obione limbata, also known as the Limber Sage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Obione limbata include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often dried and used as a tea or infused in oil to extract its medicinal properties.
